name: Cookie Jar
summary: Smart-contract-governed funding pools for DAOs and communities.
description: Cookie Jar is listed in the Dev Guild public project surface as a funding primitive for communities: shared jars with allowlists, NFT gating, and configurable withdrawal rules.
